title: Decadent Flaky Indian Plum Gulab Jamun
description: A rich and indulgent Indian dessert featuring ume-plum, with a jammy and flaky texture, steamed to perfection in a shojin-friendly style, formed into traditional gulab jamun.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, ghee, and milk to form a smooth dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes soft and pliable.
Divide the dough into small balls and flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
Place a few pieces of ume-plum in the center of each disk and fold the dough over to form a ball.
Steam the gulab jamun in a steamer basket for 10 minutes until they are cooked through.
In a large saucepan, combine the sugar, water, rose water, and cardamom powder to make the syrup.
Bring the syrup to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the steamed gulab jamun to the syrup and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
